chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-6735 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.28412/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 08.09.2025 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Asad Ahmed, advocate for KMC. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ------------- Learned counsel for the petitioners states that the petitioners would be satisfied if this petition is disposed of in terms of order dated 25.08.2025 passed in C.P No.D-6323 of 2022. Learned counsel for the KMC and learned AAG have no objection to such proposition. The material part of the order dated 25.08.2025 is set out below for ease of reference:- “The petitioners would be satisfied if the Director, Abbasi Shaheed Hospital/respondent No.6 review the case of each of petitioners and if it was found that they worked within the period of 2nd June, 2020 to 14th October, 2020 and produce a certificate to that effect and if they have not already been paid, recommend the Secretary Health, Government of Sindh, to make the applicable payments which might be due to them. Learned AAG and learned counsel for the respondent No.6 have no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. The Director, Abbasi Shaheed Hospital/respondent No.6, is directed to review the case of each of the petitioners as and when they make an application to him and to decide the same based on evidence that they worked during the Covid period as stipulated above (2nd June, 2020 to 14th October, 2020) and if the payment has not already been paid to them under Special Allowance, he may recommend such payments which shall be made by the Secretary Health Department, Government of Sindh.

Order accordingly. The Director, Abbasi Shaheed Hospital/respondent No.6, is directed to review the case of each of the petitioners as and when they make an application to him and to decide the same based on evidence that they worked during the Covid period as stipulated above (2nd June, 2020 to 14th October, 2020) and if the payment has not already been paid to them under Special Allowance, he may recommend such payments which shall be made by the Secretary Health Department, Government of Sindh. All such applications shall be decided within 03 months’ of the date of this order through a speaking order. In the event that any of the petitioners do not approach the Director, Abbasi Shaheed Hospital/respondent No.6, within 06 months, of the date of this order as such this proposition does not apply to them to entertain the same as the matter needs finality. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director, Abbasi Shaheed Hospital/respondent No.6 for compliance.” The instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application(s). A copy of this order shall be sent to Director Abbasi Shaheed Hospital Karachi / respondent No.5 for compliance. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
